zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter d'Evreux於大約1033年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧馬雷時，他的父親Guillaume d'Évreux44歲，母親Havoïse d'Eschauffour28歲。他於1055年與Philippa Normandie在法國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1085年在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter d'Evreux于大约1033年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧馬雷时，他的父亲Guillaume d'Évreux44岁，母亲Havoïse d'Eschauffour28岁。他于1055年与Philippa Normandie在法国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1085年在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Evreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter d'Evreux was born about 1033, in Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume d'Évreux, was 44 and his mother, Havoïse d'Eschauffour, was 28. He married Philippa Normandie in 1055, in France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1085, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter d'Evreux est né environ 1033, à Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume d'Évreux, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Havoïse d'Eschauffour, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Normandie en 1055, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1085, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter d'Evreux um 1033 in Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume d'Évreux 44 und seine Mutter Havoïse d'Eschauffour 28. Er hat 1055 in Frankreich Philippa Normandie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1085 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter d'Evreux è nato il circa 1033 nel Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume d'Évreux, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Havoïse d'Eschauffour, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Normandie nel 1055, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1085, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter d'Evreuxが約1033年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウマアで生まれた時，父Guillaume d'Évreuxは44歳，母Havoïse d'Eschauffourは28歳であった。1055年にフランスでPhilippa Normandieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1085年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter d'Evreux(이)가 대략 1033년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루마에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume d'Évreux(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Havoïse d'Eschauffour(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1055년 프랑스에서 Philippa Normandie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1085년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter d'Evreux nasceu aproximadamente 1033, em Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume d'Évreux, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Havoïse d'Eschauffour, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Normandie em 1055, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1085, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter d'Evreux родился около 1033 г. в местности роумар, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume d'Évreux было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Havoïse d'Eschauffour, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Normandie в 1055 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1085 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter d'Evreux nació aproximadamente 1033, en Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume d'Évreux, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Havoïse d'Eschauffour, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Philippa Normandie en 1055, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1085, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
